case_title: GREENFORCE CLEAN TEAM LLC VS. LIOR NUCHI

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENFORCE CLEAN TEAM LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NUCHI, LIOR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS NOT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD);RECEIVED **AFTER** COURT DISMISSAL COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NUCHI, LIOR
